title: find_base_type should handle type aliases defined with TypeAlias
body:
find_base_type() in radicli/util.py traverses __bases__ to find a registered type, but stops if the type has no __bases__ attribute (e.g. types created with typing.TypeAlias or NewType). This raises AttributeError.



Fix: wrap the __bases__ access in a hasattr check and return None if not found.
Add a test in radicli/tests/test_util.py using NewType.
